artPrompt: The dramatic moment a town vote erupts: a sea of ordinary townsfolk on folding chairs raise their hands in unison, the foreground figures foreshortened and shouting, a lone moderator silhouetted behind an empty lectern against a low golden beam slanting through high windows. Leafy green banners hang blank, warm ivory dust drifts, deep shadow shapes pool beneath the chairs. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Town Hall Meeting
text:
The table votes recall or status quo. Each player votes once for each Voter they control, plus once for themselves.
Recall — Each opponent who controls more permanents than you sacrifices a creature.
Status quo — You draw a card and create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. (Nothing got decided, but you networked.)
flavorText: Scheduled for 7. Started at 7:40. Ended never.
